frontends.name: app.frankencoin.com
frontends.creator: Frankencoin Association
frontends.notes: Frontend built by the Frankencoin Association. Connect a wallet to mint and repay positions, access savings, and trade FPS. Source code and indexer are public.

frontends.name: zchf.app
frontends.creator: dnbjn
frontends.notes: Self-hosted frontend, API, and Ponder indexer. Reworked UI with dark/light mode, added host information on the Earn page, and routes indexer access through a failover-enabled API. Deployed on Railway behind a Cloudflare Tunnel.

frontends.name: frankencoin.win
frontends.creator: DiumPay
frontends.notes: Independent open-source frontend by DiumPay. Multi-language support, fast and lightweight! Features included a non-custodial and no kyc cross-chain swap for ZCHF users.

frontends.name: dasabami.com
frontends.creator: socraticblock
frontends.notes: Open-source fork by socraticblock, in development. Currently relies on the canonical API and indexer; the maintainer plans to self-host the Ponder indexer later.
